phases.name: scrape
steps: hit SAM.gov public API /opportunities/v2/search with NAICS 541512,541519,541690
filter: active status + deadline within 90 days + IT/ICAM/cybersecurity keywords
extract: title, contract value, deadline, agency, NAICS, set-aside type (8a/SDVOSB/small biz)

phases.name: qualify
steps: score by contract value (>$500K = high priority)
rank by opportunity score: value * set_aside_ease * deadline_urgency

phases.name: distribute
steps: post top 3 weekly contracts to content pipeline via engagement_bait_converter.py
append qualified leads to ALPHA_STAGING as BROKERING type
generate cold outreach batch for small IT contractors from lead DB
